name: LED Light Module – 3W/110V – IP65 – 100pcs Set
description: Transform your environment with ZION LED USA 3-Watt, 110V LED Module presents a dazzling array of multicolors, including (Bright White, Fiery Red, Lush Green, Deep Blue, Warm White, and Regal Purple) providing a radiant output of 390 lumens. With a wide 160-degree viewing angle and an IP65 waterproof certification, this module is ideal for versatile outdoor applications.
short_desc: Product Attributes: Wattage: 3W/module Brightness: 390 lm/module Colors: Cool White, Warm White, Red, Green, Blue Voltage: 110V / 220V Power Factor: ≥ 0.9 Efficacy: 130 lm/W CRI: 90+ Viewing Angle: 160° Dimmable: Yes Temperature Range: -20°C to 60°C Material: Aluminum & PC Housing Color: White / Clear Lens Cover: Clear Waterproof: IP68 Certification: UL Lifespan: 50,000 hours Warranty: 3 Years Length: 48 ft
